member.name: T:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.connection.nxm_eb_client_manager
member.summary: "new" nxm-eb-client-manager for using shared eb_client and dynamically created "users", each working with own 'transaction-thread'

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.connection.nxm_eb_client_manager._try_create_eb_client(navo.cocoon.data.login_request)
member.summary: tries to create EB-client using given login request

member.summary: controls EB creation instances (not allowed when any of already existins is in use by someone)

member.name: T:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.connection.nxm_eb_client_user
member.summary: "new" nxm-eb-client using shared eb_client and dynamically created "users", each working with own 'transaction-thread'

member.name: F:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.dist.eb_dist_document.DOCTYPE_OTHER
member.summary:
document type SOR - sales order sQR - quote request SIV - sales invoice
POR - purchase order GI - goods issued GR - goods received CI - cash issue CR - cash received

member.name: P:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.dist.eb_dist_document.doc_discount_amount
member.summary: whole document discount amount deducted from total-value

member.name: P:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.dist.eb_dist_document.doc_delivery_cost
member.summary: delivery cost - added to total value

member.name: P:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.dist.eb_dist_document.doc_insurance_cost
member.summary: insurance cost added to total value

member.name: P:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.dist.eb_dist_document.doc_payment_cost_perc
member.summary: payment processing cost percentage - added to total value, before payment!

member.name: P:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.dist.eb_dist_document_line.base_unit_price_netto_doc_curr
member.summary: base unit price netto in document currency

member.name: P:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.dist.eb_dist_document_line.final_unit_price_netto_doc_curr
member.summary: final unit price netto in document currency

member.name: P:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.dist.eb_dist_document_line.final_unit_price_brutto_doc_curr
member.summary: final unit price brutto in document currency

member.name: P:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.dist.eb_dist_document_line.final_unit_price_brutto_acc_curr
member.summary: final unit price brutto in accounting currency

member.summary: convert VAT code to NAVO EB VAT code

member.name: P:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.dcl`1.original
member.summary: previous document in correction chain, null when 'document' is original

member.name: T:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.eb_fundamental_queries
member.summary: "fundamental" queries, base for many specialized queries

member.name: T:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.eb_fundamental_queries.product_stock
member.summary: product stock info with quantity, price, value info (when object contains cumulated data, some fields are meaningless)

member.name: P:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.eb_fundamental_queries.product_quantities_info.reservation_stocks_quantity
member.summary: total quantity available in 'reservation-stocks' = total reserved quantity

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.eb_fundamental_queries.sales_documents_with_originals(nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.Entities)
member.summary: returns sales documents joined with originals

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.eb_fundamental_queries.sales_documents_with_originals_customer(nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.Entities)
member.summary: returns sales documents joined with originals and customers (commonly used in reports)

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.eb_fundamental_queries.purchase_documents_with_originals(nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.Entities)
member.summary: returns purchase documents joined with originals

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.eb_fundamental_queries.purchase_documents_with_originals_supplier(nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.Entities)
member.summary: returns purchase documents joined with originals and suppliers (commonly used in reports)

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.eb_fundamental_queries.stock_by_product_warehouse_price(nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.Entities,System.Linq.IQueryable{nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.n5gmstan})
member.summary: basic stock-query returns product stocks grouped by product/warehouse/price/delivery-id

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.eb_fundamental_queries.stock_by_product_warehouse(nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.Entities,System.Linq.IQueryable{nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.n5gmstan})
member.summary: basic stock-query returns product stocks grouped by product/warehouse

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.eb_fundamental_queries.stock_by_product(nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.Entities,System.Linq.IQueryable{nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.n5gmstan})
member.summary: returns stock information grouped by product_id (total for all warehouses filtered)
returns composite information about product quantities: for sale, reserverd, ordered etc.

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.sales_invoice_ddr_eb._query_sales_ddr(nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.Entities)
member.summary: queries sales documents (including corrections) each result items contains sales document line (possibly reduced by original sale document)

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.sales_invoice_ddr_eb._query_store_cost_by_sales_document_ddr(nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.Entities)
member.summary: returns COGS (cost of goods sold) aggregated by sales document x product/subproduct each result item contains sum of quantity/cost of given product on given document

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.queries.sales_invoice_ddr_eb._query_sales_doc_profit_ddr(nxm.data.query.list.execution._lqi_context_{nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.ps.Entities})
member.summary: returns sales document netto-sales-amount and profit each result item contains value for single document

member.name: T:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.eb_ef_provider_utils_
member.summary: common EB providers' utils [MIGRATION-NOTE: this class finally will swallow eb_ef_provider_utils. put all new things here]

member.name: T:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.eb_model_service_provider_
member.summary: model service provider (MSP) for NAVO EuroBusiness 'actions' part
model service provider (MSP) for NAVO EuroBusiness [MIGRATION-NOTE: this class should be not abstract after migration]
[MIGRATION-NOTE: this constructor should be made internal and have adjusted parameters after migration is completed]

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.eb_model_service_provider_._eb_create_model_object(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,System.String,nxm.data.core.access.idata_reader)
member.summary: create new model object using non-persitent ID these models will disapper after transaction end and its data can be accessed only by using persisten ID assigned by ERP

member.name: M:nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.eb_model_service_provider_._eb_execution_wrapper(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,System.Func{nxm.msp.navo_eurobusiness.eb_msp_aec,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{nxm.system._result_}})
member.summary: wrapper for executing procedure with use of EB-client takes care for creating/destroying access/action-execution-context

member.summary: wrapper for executing procedure with use of EB-client takes care for creating/destroying access/action-execution-context

member.summary: execute procedure with use of EB-client and return results
